queries.name: user-institution-certificates
queries.query: (Harvard OR Stanford OR MIT OR Coursera OR Udemy OR bootcamp OR edX) (certificate OR certification OR certified OR credential) min_faves:3 lang:en -is:retweet
queries.description: Users celebrating certificates from major institutions
queries.rationale: Users tweet about earning certificates - prime engagement moment

queries.name: course-completion-celebrations
queries.query: (completed OR finished OR earned OR graduated) (bootcamp OR online course OR certification program) min_faves:3 lang:en -is:retweet

queries.name: credential-fraud-discussions
queries.query: (fake degree OR diploma mill OR credential fraud OR fake certificate OR fraudulent diploma) min_faves:5 lang:en -is:retweet
queries.description: Discussions about credential fraud - core pain point
queries.rationale: Direct pain point Blockchain Badges solves

queries.name: credential-verification-needs
queries.query: (verify OR verification OR authenticate OR validation) (degree OR diploma OR certificate OR credential) min_faves:3 lang:en -is:retweet

queries.name: hr-verification-pain
queries.query: (HR OR hiring OR recruiter OR recruitment) (verify OR check OR validation) (degree OR credential OR certificate) lang:en -is:retweet
queries.rationale: Decision makers with direct pain point

queries.name: blockchain-education
queries.query: (blockchain OR web3) (education OR credential OR certificate OR learning OR university) min_faves:5 lang:en -is:retweet
queries.rationale: Tech-savvy audience interested in blockchain credentials

queries.name: digital-credentials-tech
queries.query: (digital credential OR digital badge OR micro-credential OR verifiable credential OR open badges) min_faves:3 lang:en -is:retweet
queries.rationale: Industry discussions about our solution space

queries.name: starting-programs
queries.query: (enrolled OR enrolling OR starting OR joined) (university OR bootcamp OR certification program OR online course) lang:en -is:retweet

queries.name: educational-achievements
queries.query: (proud OR excited OR finally) (certificate OR certification OR diploma OR degree OR graduated) min_faves:3 lang:en -is:retweet

queries.name: professional-development
queries.query: (professional development OR upskilling OR reskilling OR career change) (certificate OR certification OR course) min_faves:3 lang:en -is:retweet

queries.name: online-learning-platforms
queries.query: (Coursera OR Udemy OR edX OR Udacity OR LinkedIn Learning OR Skillshare OR Pluralsight) (completed OR certificate OR course) min_faves:3 lang:en -is:retweet

queries.name: university-mentions-achievements
queries.query: (Harvard OR Stanford OR MIT OR Yale OR Oxford OR Cambridge) (certificate OR program OR course OR graduated) min_faves:3 lang:en -is:retweet

queries.name: tech-bootcamp-graduates

queries.name: employer-credential-concerns
queries.query: (employer OR company OR organization) (verify OR validation OR authenticate) (credential OR certificate OR degree) lang:en -is:retweet

settings.description: Discovers USERS discussing credentials, certificates, and educational achievements. Monitors pain points (credential fraud, verification needs) and solution-space discussions (blockchain + education). Strategy pivoted from institution-monitoring (0 results) to user-conversation monitoring (40-90 tweets/day expected).
